archetypes.label: Bull Investor
archetypes.behavior_template: Looks for reasons to buy. Ignores warning signs. Focuses on long-term growth.

archetypes.label: Bear Investor
archetypes.behavior_template: Looks for reasons to sell. Anticipates downturns. Focuses on capital preservation.

archetypes.label: Day Trader
archetypes.behavior_template: Reacts to minute-by-minute news. Amplifies momentum. No long-term view.

archetypes.label: Institutional Analyst
archetypes.behavior_template: Issues formal ratings. Influences large fund flows. Very sensitive to macro data.

archetypes.label: Central Bank / Fed
archetypes.behavior_template: Communicates through 'hints'. Adjusts rates and liquidity. The ultimate market setter.

archetypes.label: Retail Investor
archetypes.behavior_template: Follows trends. Prone to panic selling and FOMO buying. Power in numbers.
